meaning: adj.空运的,空气传播的,空降的
examples: He enlisted in the 82nd Airborne 20 years ago.
The allies landed thousands of airborne troops.
Ford was attached to the 101st Airborne Division.
Lieutenant Colonel Greg Butts(ph), a battalion commander for the 101st Airborne Division, gives a driving tour.
He was the commander of the 101st airborne division during the initial invasion of Iraq.
